import pandas as pd
import numpy as np


def calculate_discount(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    df["discount"] = np.where(
        df["amount"] > 1000,
        df["amount"] * 0.1,
        np.where(df["amount"] > 500, df["amount"] * 0.05, 0),
    )
    return df


def compute_tax(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    df["tax"] = df["price"] * df["quantity"] * 0.08
    return df
